channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: FIFA Introduces Championship Rings for 2026 World Cup Winners with Luxury Cost Details
item.description: FIFA has introduced championship-style rings for the first time in World Cup history, awarding them to Spain as the 2026 winners. Each ring, made from 18-karat gold and adorned with 89 diamonds and 36...

item.title: Junior Springboks retain World Rugby U20 Championship with resilient display against France
item.description: The Junior Springboks have retained their World Rugby U20 Championship title after a hard-fought 16-5 victory over France in Tbilisi. Coach Kevin Foote highlighted the team's resilience, noting they o...

item.title: Kogi State rescues four kidnapped persons in Dekina after coordinated security operation
item.description: The Kogi State Government has confirmed the successful rescue of four individuals kidnapped during an attack on an unauthorized examination center in Olowa, Dekina Local Government Area. Commissioner ...

item.title: Wayne Rooney criticises World Cup halftime show amid mixed celebrity reactions
item.description: Wayne Rooney has publicly criticised FIFA's first-ever World Cup halftime show, calling it a 'disaster' and claiming the 'best part was when it ended'. The event, which featured performances by Madonn...

item.title: Internet shutdown in Jammu and Kashmir's Doda following police firing incident
item.description: In Jammu and Kashmir's Doda district, internet services have remained suspended for three days following a police firing incident that resulted in the death of a man. The suspension, imposed by author...

item.title: IBAO's Role in Supporting Ontario Brokers Through Education and Advocacy
item.description: The Insurance Brokers Association of Ontario (IBAO) plays a crucial role in supporting insurance brokers across the province by focusing on three key areas: advocacy, education, and leadership initiat...

item.title: Kylian Mbappé surpasses Lionel Messi's World Cup goal record
item.description: Kylian Mbappé of France surpassed Lionel Messi's long-standing record for most career goals in a single World Cup tournament by scoring his 21st and 22nd goals during France's 6-4 third-place playoff ...

item.title: Oil Prices Projected to Rise Significantly by Third Week of July
item.description: The article discusses the anticipated significant increase in global oil prices during the third week of July, which could impact various sectors including transportation and energy. Analysts suggest ...

item.title: Guide to Prop Trading in Australia: Key Providers and Considerations in 2026
item.description: This article provides an in-depth analysis of prop trading opportunities in Australia in 2026, highlighting key providers such as FundedFast, FundedNext, FTMO, FundingPips, E8 Markets, and BrightFunde...

item.title: Census 2027's Caste Data Challenges and Policy Implications
item.description: The article discusses the challenges faced by the 2027 caste census in India, where the government's approach of using an open column for caste self-reporting is criticized for producing unusable data...

item.title: Chinese Company Claims UK Owes Compensation for British Steel Nationalization
item.description: A Chinese company is asserting that the United Kingdom must provide compensation for the nationalization of British Steel during the 1980s. The claim, which dates back to the 1980s when the UK governm...

item.title: Abia State Govt Addresses Flooding Concerns Along Owerinta Road
item.description: The Abia State government has responded to a viral video showing severe flooding along the Owerinta Road corridor, attributing the issue to heavy rainfall and ongoing construction activities. Official...

item.title: Man Killed in Ol Kalou Election Violence Shares Final Moments with Widow
item.description: Zakaria Gakinya, 45, was attacked by armed men near a polling station in Ol Kalou after casting his vote. His widow, Mary Wanjiru, described visiting him in hospital as he cried in pain, recounting hi...

item.title: Gang-related murder of Kaydon Pasquelle in Saldanha sparks community fear
item.description: Kaydon Pasquelle, brother of murdered Chantel Pasquelle-Hoorn, was fatally shot in Saldanha on Friday evening. The incident occurred in Frigate Street, Hopland, with reports indicating he was shot 23 ...

item.title: Black Market Dollar to Naira Exchange Rate for July 20th, 2026
item.description: The article details the current dollar to naira exchange rate in the black market (Aboki fx) for July 20th, 2026. According to sources at Bureau De Change (BDC), Lagos Parallel Market players are sell...

item.title: Strait of Hormuz sees low tanker activity amid Middle East tensions
item.description: Shipping data reveals a significant decline in tanker activity through the Strait of Hormuz, a critical chokepoint for global oil trade, as tensions between the United States and Iran escalate. On Jul...

item.title: Political Tensions Escalate as PML-N and PPP Clash Over Remarks
item.description: Prime Minister’s Adviser on Political Affairs Rana Sanaullah has expressed concerns that Pakistan Peoples Party (PPP) Chairman Bilawal Bhutto Zardari’s recent remarks could exacerbate political tensio...

item.title: Argentina's World Cup Final Ends in Disgrace After Red Card Incident
item.description: The article details the controversial conclusion of Argentina's World Cup match against Spain, where Leandro Paredes was shown a red card following the final whistle. The incident sparked widespread d...

item.title: Netflix Acquires Ben Affleck's AI Filmmaking Startup for $587M
item.description: Netflix has acquired InterPositive, an AI startup co-founded by actor and director Ben Affleck, for $587 million in cash. The deal, announced in March 2026, marks a significant investment in AI-driven...

item.title: Lorenz Defensor's Role in Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial
item.description: Lorenz Defensor, Iloilo 3rd District representative, leads the prosecution team in Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial. The case against Duterte centers on alleged constitutional violation...
